details: SessionStart hook fires on startup/resume/clear/compact
SessionEnd hook fires on exit
PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks fire per tool call
FileChanged hook fires when monitored files change
ConfigChange hook fires when settings change
PreCompact/PostCompact hooks fire around compaction
InstructionsLoaded hook shows which files loaded
Stop hook fires when Claude finishes response
StopFailure fires on API errors (rate_limit/auth/billing)
Input/output/cache tokens in API response and OTel
Cost in USD via OTel claude_code.cost.usage metric
rate_limits field in statusLine (5h/7d windows)
ps aux for process memory; main 150-400MB subagent ~45MB
Count claude processes to detect subagent accumulation
/context command shows token breakdown by component
InstructionsLoaded hook lists loaded CLAUDE.md and rules
Read ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/MEMORY.md
model setting or ANTHROPIC_MODEL or /model command
permission_mode field in all hook input JSON
effortLevel setting or CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL
claude mcp list or /mcp in session
sandbox.enabled in settings.json
Running claude process indicates active session
claude --print --resume processes are active subagents
<repo>/.claude/worktrees/ directories
TaskGet/TaskList tools expose current tasks
--output-format stream-json for real-time tool/edit events
InstructionsLoaded lists all loaded instruction files
InstructionsLoaded includes path-scoped rule files
Read hooks config from settings.json
ps aux for Electron process memory
ps aux | grep mcp-server for MCP child processes
Read claude_desktop_config.json
